---
title: Folktale week
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779790332/folktalesweek_ej40cp.png
description: Folktale week - légende de Dahut
categories: ["miscellaneous"]
date: 2025-11-28
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779790332/folktalesweek_ej40cp.png)
